---
title: "Untitled"
author: "张子杰"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
# 加载包
library(dplyr)       # 数据筛选和处理
library(jsonlite)    # 读取JSON格式的Yelp数据
library(data.table)  # 高效处理大数据集
```


```{r}
# ========== 你的本地路径 ==========
business_path <- "C:/Users/86180/Desktop/毕业材料/毕业论文/论文数据/Yelp JSON/yelp_academic_dataset_business.json"
review_path <- "C:/Users/86180/Desktop/毕业材料/毕业论文/论文数据/Yelp JSON/yelp_academic_dataset_review.json"

# ========== 1. 读取商家数据（移除手动close） ==========
# 设置编码为UTF-8，避免乱码（stream_in会自动管理文件连接）
business_df <- stream_in(file(business_path, encoding = "UTF-8")) %>% 
  as.data.table()
```


```{r}
# ========== 2. 筛选符合条件的中餐厅 ==========
target_city <- "Philadelphia"  # 可替换为Phoenix/Toronto等

chinese_restaurants <- business_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(categories) & grepl("Chinese", categories, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(city) & city == target_city) %>%
  filter(review_count > 100) %>%
  arrange(desc(review_count)) %>%
  head(100)

# 验证筛选结果
cat("筛选出的符合条件的中餐厅数量：", nrow(chinese_restaurants), "\n")
if (nrow(chinese_restaurants) < 100) {
  warning(paste("目标城市", target_city, "符合条件的中餐厅不足100条，仅返回", nrow(chinese_restaurants), "条"))
}
```



```{r}
# 直接提取100家餐厅的business_id（无需去重，本身唯一）
target_biz_ids <- chinese_restaurants$business_id

# 构建哈希集合（快速判断评论所属餐厅是否在目标列表）
target_biz_set <- new.env(hash = TRUE, size = length(target_biz_ids))
for (id in target_biz_ids) {
  target_biz_set[[id]] <- TRUE
}
```


```{r}
# 初始化空列表存匹配的评论
matched_reviews <- list()
counter <- 0

# 逐行读取+筛选
con <- file(review_path, open = "r", encoding = "UTF-8")
while (length(line <- readLines(con, n = 1, warn = FALSE)) > 0) {
  if (trimws(line) == "") next  # 跳过空行
  
  # 解析单行评论，只保留匹配的
  tryCatch({
    review <- fromJSON(line)
    if (exists(review$business_id, envir = target_biz_set)) {
      counter <- counter + 1
      matched_reviews[[counter]] <- data.table(
        business_id = review$business_id,
        review_id = review$review_id,
        text = review$text,    # 评论内容
        stars = review$stars,  # 评分
        date = review$date     # 评论日期
      )
    }
  }, error = function(e) {})
}
close(con)

# 转成表格格式
matched_reviews <- rbindlist(matched_reviews, fill = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# 匹配餐厅和评论（一一对应）
final_result <- merge(
  x = chinese_restaurants,
  y = matched_reviews,
  by = "business_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)
```


```{r}
# 保存到桌面
output_path <- "C:/Users/86180/Desktop/100家中餐厅评论结果.csv"
write.csv(final_result, output_path, row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")

# 查看结果统计
cat("匹配到评论数：", nrow(matched_reviews), "\n")
cat("结果已保存至：", output_path, "\n")
```
```{r}
output_path100<- "C:/Users/86180/Desktop/毕业材料/毕业论文/论文数据/100家中餐厅结果.csv"
write.csv(chinese_restaurants,output_path100,row.names = FALSE,fileEncoding = "UTF-8")

cat("成功")
```
